verses.text: Moses gathers the congregation to consecrate Aaron and his sons. Consecration. The priesthood is publicly set apart.
Moses gathers the congregation to consecrate Aaron and his sons. Consecration. The priesthood is publicly set apart.
Moses gathers the congregation to consecrate Aaron and his sons. Consecration. The priesthood is publicly set apart.
Moses gathers the congregation to consecrate Aaron and his sons. Consecration. The priesthood is publicly set apart.
Moses gathers the congregation to consecrate Aaron and his sons. Consecration. The priesthood is publicly set apart.
He washes and robes Aaron with the ephod, breastplate, and mitre. Robed. The high priest is arrayed in holy garments.
He washes and robes Aaron with the ephod, breastplate, and mitre. Robed. The high priest is arrayed in holy garments.
He washes and robes Aaron with the ephod, breastplate, and mitre. Robed. The high priest is arrayed in holy garments.
He washes and robes Aaron with the ephod, breastplate, and mitre. Robed. The high priest is arrayed in holy garments.
He anoints the tabernacle, Aaron, and his sons with the oil. Anointed. All is sanctified with oil.
He anoints the tabernacle, Aaron, and his sons with the oil. Anointed. All is sanctified with oil.
He anoints the tabernacle, Aaron, and his sons with the oil. Anointed. All is sanctified with oil.
He anoints the tabernacle, Aaron, and his sons with the oil. Anointed. All is sanctified with oil.
The sin offering bullock is offered for atonement. Sin offering. Atonement begins the consecration.
The sin offering bullock is offered for atonement. Sin offering. Atonement begins the consecration.
The sin offering bullock is offered for atonement. Sin offering. Atonement begins the consecration.
The sin offering bullock is offered for atonement. Sin offering. Atonement begins the consecration.
The burnt offering ram is wholly burnt, a sweet savour. Burnt offering. Full devotion is offered.
The burnt offering ram is wholly burnt, a sweet savour. Burnt offering. Full devotion is offered.
The burnt offering ram is wholly burnt, a sweet savour. Burnt offering. Full devotion is offered.
The burnt offering ram is wholly burnt, a sweet savour. Burnt offering. Full devotion is offered.
The ram of consecration's blood is put on Aaron's ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is set to God.
The ram of consecration's blood is put on Aaron's ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is set to God.
The ram of consecration's blood is put on Aaron's ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is set to God.
The fat and parts are waved and burnt; Moses has the breast. Waved. The offering is presented to God.
The fat and parts are waved and burnt; Moses has the breast. Waved. The offering is presented to God.
The fat and parts are waved and burnt; Moses has the breast. Waved. The offering is presented to God.
The fat and parts are waved and burnt; Moses has the breast. Waved. The offering is presented to God.
The fat and parts are waved and burnt; Moses has the breast. Waved. The offering is presented to God.
Moses sprinkles oil and blood on Aaron and his garments. Sprinkled. Priest and robes are hallowed together.
Moses sprinkles oil and blood on Aaron and his garments. Sprinkled. Priest and robes are hallowed together.
Moses sprinkles oil and blood on Aaron and his garments. Sprinkled. Priest and robes are hallowed together.
They abide seven days at the door, keeping the LORD's charge. Seven days. Consecration is not rushed.
